title: Panda® Bamboo Memory Foam Pillow | Orthopaedic Head, Spine & Neck Support | Soft Bamboo Cover | Medium-Firm & Supportive | Contours to Your Sleeping Position | 60 x 40 x 12 cm | 30-Night Trial
features: BETTER BEDTIME: Made with third generation memory foam, this bamboo pillow contours to your sleeping position, keeping back, front & side sleepers' neck & spine aligned for a happy, healthy night's sleep

STRONG & SOFT: Not too firm but not too soft, you can lay down your head for a night of bespoke comfort with this medium-firm supportive pillow that supports head, spine & neck for full spinal alignment

TEMPERATURE CONTROL: Bamboo is a thermoregulating material that reacts to your body temperature, keeping you cool when it's hot & warm when it's colder for the for the best 'fresh side of the pillow' feeling all night long
EASILY WASHABLE: With an easy zip-off bamboo cover, each pillow case can be machine washed at 40°. Inner pillow: Wipe clean only

KIND TO THE PLANET: Made with bamboo, one of the planet's natural resources, minimising environmental impact for better bedtimes. Our hypoallergenic pillows come with a 30-Night Trial; return for a full refund and we'll cover the postage cost

specifications_table.Other Special Features of the Product: Breathable, Cooling, Hypoallergenic, Neck Support, Removable Cover
specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Back Sleeper, Multi Position Sleeper, Side Sleeper, Stomach Sleeper
